# comfyui_prompt_json (Data Source)

Imports and normalizes native ComfyUI prompt JSON from a file path or raw JSON string.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `json` (String) Optional raw ComfyUI prompt JSON string.
- `path` (String) Optional file path to load prompt JSON from.

### Read-Only

- `node_count` (Number) Number of nodes in the imported prompt.
- `normalized_json` (String) Normalized ComfyUI prompt JSON.
